original_image_tags: A scanned archival index card or label. The background is a plain off-white or aged card stock. The text is typed. In the upper left corner, the number "518" is typed. Centered near the top is the text: "Flying Disc" Found Saybrook, Ill. 7-26-47. There is a small, dark mark or staple hole visible in the upper left corner of the card.

elements.description: A blank or plain paper background with stamped or typed text. Top left: upside-down number '518'. Top center-right: text '"Flying Disc" Found Saybrook, Ill. 7-26-47'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the core visual content: an index card with typed text including '518' and '"Flying Disc" Found Saybrook, Ill. 7-26-47', but they add or omit minor details like a dark mark/staple hole and the orientation of '518' without contradiction.
